$comment: Single source of truth for tier classification, file caps, and budgets. Read by measure-tokens.js and validate-host.js. Phase 0 ships in observe-only mode (enforce_caps: false). Phase 2f flips enforce to true.
$comment_caps: Caps reflect realistic floors with 12 months of memory. Tier 1 is dominated by user content (personality, integrations, INDEX descriptions). Framework files (AGENTS.md, capture-rules, manifest) are aggressively trimmed; further cuts would lose findability. Original baseline before optimization: 8,278 tokens / 463 lines. Tier 1 was tightened to 5,800 in the 2026-04-29 token-optimization PR; raised to 7,500 on 2026-04-30 (organic memory growth + A3 session-block overhead); raised to 7,800 on 2026-04-30 (autonomy roadmap Ship 1) to absorb AGENTS.md Action-states + Conversational-tics rules. Raised again 2026-05-01 (wiki-graph: split profile/people.md and service-providers.md into per-entity pages, expanding INDEX rows). Revisit when Tier 1 baseline drifts past 7,000.

tier1_files.$comment: Original 120 lines. Slimmed to ~70. Cap 80 → 90: absorbs Action-states + Conversational-tics rules (autonomy Ship 1) and security-cycles Hard Rules (untrusted ingress, outbound writes, bash policy, tamper detection, mechanical backstops).

Cap 90: covers archive + 4 sub-indexes (events/movies/photography/calendar-events) + root files + small sub-trees with growth headroom. Raised from 70 → 80 → 90 across 2026-04-30 (calendar events subindex; security cycles).

Auto-generated entity index for fast recall lookup; capped at ~150 rows in lib/entity-index.js writeEntitiesAtomic. Loaded right after INDEX.md so both daily-Dream-regenerated files invalidate together.
Cap 60: migration 0014 seeds 7 starter questions (~43 lines incl. frontmatter). Headroom for 2-3 organically-promoted questions before alerting.
